assertions.assertion: Program.cs uses different connection strings for configuration store and operational store
Program.cs sets DefaultSchema = 'config' or similar on the configuration store options
Program.cs sets DefaultSchema = 'ops' or similar on the operational store options
Program.cs calls MigrationsHistoryTable for at least one of the stores with a custom table name and schema
assertions.rationale: Both stores have MigrationsHistoryTable with custom names and schemas.

assertions.assertion: appsettings.json contains both ConfigDb and OpsDb connection strings under ConnectionStrings
assertions.rationale: Both ConfigDb and OpsDb connection strings present.
